qa.description: our LOCAL provider values graded against the live field reward band (q25,q75) and consensus median +/-500ppm; independent of whether we submit on-chain
qa.caveat: qa is a pre-submission local measurement; on the graded overlap window it agrees with on-chain grading on 96.2% of rows, but it understates ETH/USD and XRP/USD (on-chain accuracy for those feeds measured higher than qa shows)

advisory.human_summary: On-chain accuracy grading is live. The qa block provides an independent local cross-check against the field reward band.

advisories.message: The qa block grades our local provider values against the field reward band (q25,q75) and consensus median decoded from the ~76 field voters' on-chain reveals. Grading and scale verification have no dependency on the Data Availability API. qa freshness still depends on the local recorder writing rows; check status.qa_lag_rounds.

qa understates ETH/USD and XRP/USD secondary accuracy (about -32pp / -28pp vs on-chain grading on a 59,220-row overlap window; known local sampling bias). No feed is overstated — read qa as a conservative floor, not protocol-graded accuracy.
The epochs table entries for reward epochs 412-416 are fully verified on-chain history (decoded reveals) and remain trustworthy during the submission pause.
